summary: Backend testing complete for Cuisine Close-Day workflow (iter121). All 16 pytest tests passed covering the 9 scenarios requested by main agent.
critical_code_review_comments: cuisine.py is 1124 lines — exceeds 700-line threshold. Recommend splitting into cuisine_orders.py, cuisine_messages.py, cuisine_inventory.py, cuisine_needs.py, cuisine_closures.py.
Module-level MongoDB client (db_client = AsyncIOMotorClient(...)) is repeated across many routers; consider centralising in a shared db module to avoid multiple event-loop-scoped clients.

close_kitchen_day filters tables in Python (cui_items + date) rather than via MongoDB query — fine for current volumes but should use $match on cuisine_day_closed_at + created_at regex for the day for scalability.
POST /api/cuisine/close-day uses raw dict payload instead of a Pydantic body model (other endpoints in the same file use BaseModel) — inconsistent and bypasses validation.
Field `total_revenue` is computed as qty*price but ignores any discounts/promotions on the table; acceptable for kitchen reporting but should be documented as 'PV cuisine brut'.
test_credentials: Not used — workflow tested via direct caisse_tables seeding (per agent-to-agent context note).
seed_data_creation: Inserted 3 caisse_tables docs tagged TEST_ITER121 (2 active, 1 all_ready). Fully cleaned up in module teardown including caisse_tables, cuisine_day_closures, cuisine_events, audit_logs filtered by TEST_ITER121_Chef.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Test file /app/backend/tests/test_cuisine_close_day_iter121.py covers all 9 close-day scenarios. Tests are class-scoped and ordered (TestCloseDay.closure_id is set in test_close_day_success and consumed by later TestDayClosuresAdmin / TestDeleteClosure tests). Module-scope autouse fixture seeds 3 tables and cleans up. Re-runnable on the same DB.
tested_scenarios: POST /api/cuisine/close-day → success + closure with all required fields ✅
After close-day: cuisinier sees 0 active/done, admin still sees them ✅
POST /api/cuisine/close-day with no items → 400 'Aucun bon cuisine...' ✅
GET /api/cuisine/day-closures/{id} returns full closure incl. orders[] ✅
DELETE /api/cuisine/day-closures/{id} removes and adds audit_logs entry ✅
